title: What is Rei reading
wikitext:
[]: What is Rei reading?             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Thu Jul 21, 2005 10:25 am I was watching my plat disc 2 last night and i was just freeze framing everything (not just cus i can't keep up with the sub titles lol), in the scene where Asuka is talking to Rei, i tried to look at what Rei was reading, but its not in english, it kinda looks like i dunno some sort of manule. if anyone can read it please tell, it would be interesting. -On a side note, there a scene on the warship in Asuka strikes and if you pause and zoom in behind the captin hes got 3 books and the clearly visable one says captins manule, isn't that funny?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Jul 21, 2005 10:28 am Their are some very fine rips of the subtitel tracks post some place on the sight I think :P

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 21, 2005 10:40 am It's a German medical book on genetics. IN German. The stack of books in Rei's room in #05 are about genetics, psychology, and crap like that.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Jul 21, 2005 10:54 am Those do fit LOL

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Thu Jul 21, 2005 6:24 pm That would certainly explain some of her knowledge of Asuka's problems (the elevator scene) Though that insight might have more to do with her carrying Lilith's soul (?)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 21, 2005 6:43 pm Yeah, I'm sure the aliens made sure their SoLs were well-educated before shipping them out.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Fri Jul 22, 2005 8:39 am okay, that was a stupid guess/theory/hypothesis doesnt she also always read some miniature NERV handbook all the time?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Bud » Fri Jul 22, 2005 10:51 am Anno must love Germany.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 22, 2005 11:51 am The Japanese seem to have a Germany fetish in general. I guess it's more of the lingering WWII era mentality?

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Sun Jul 24, 2005 9:14 am The Japanese seem to have a Germany fetish in general. I guess it's more of the lingering WWII era mentality?

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Jul 24, 2005 4:25 pm ice reaper wrote: The Japanese seem to have a Germany fetish in general. I guess it's more of the lingering WWII era mentality?

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Sun Jul 24, 2005 4:59 pm German fetish indeed .

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Bud » Mon Jul 25, 2005 10:42 am Das Klick. Anno, it seems, has a German fetish altogether. Most of Japan just seems to have a Nazi Germany fetish. They could probably care less about lederhosen and bratwurst. [URL=http://img9.imagevenue.com/img.php?loc=loc178&image=31b_122201.jpg] [/URL] [URL=http://img5.imagevenue.com/img.php?loc=loc268&image=670_Japan_Nazi_Cosplay_306x400.jpg] [/URL] [URL=http://img25.imagevenue.com/img.php?loc=loc209&image=0ee_nazi_cos.jpg] [/URL] [URL=http://img18.imagevenue.com/img.php?loc=loc5&image=e81_nazi_cos2.jpg] [/URL] [URL=http://img7.imagevenue.com/img.php?loc=loc179&image=ef2_NSJAP.jpg] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Jul 25, 2005 1:51 pm that last picture was just f*&)(ing disturbing, as they look like little kids. then again, the rest look like teenagers perhaps this fetish has to do with the impression that somehow, nazi uniforms look cool?

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Mon Jul 25, 2005 4:26 pm sadsadshinji wrote: perhaps this fetish has to do with the impression that somehow, nazi uniforms look cool?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Bud » Mon Jul 25, 2005 4:46 pm sadsadshinji wrote: that last picture was just f*&)(ing disturbing, as they look like little kids. then again, the rest look like teenagers perhaps this fetish has to do with the impression that somehow, nazi uniforms look cool?

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Mon Jul 25, 2005 5:00 pm Hmmm on the topic of nazis. I gata say, i do think that the swastica is a cool looking symbol. It's only frowned apon by people now adays because of the hollocaust. and on the comment about nazis comeing back... well skin heads are becomeing a problem nowdays I have to say, even in my small town and in my small highschool, we hada kid who wanted to get a swastica tatoo on his head (big ass skin head)lucky for him noone would do it and he offered $500. But i gata say I like the skin head movies like american history X, it may be racists at times but its about the bad things of being a skin head.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Jul 25, 2005 5:08 pm Fools never stop amazing me really.

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Mon Jul 25, 2005 6:15 pm Well, swasticas are cool. Anyone here read "Blade of the Immortal?" The protagonist, Manji, had a (freaking HUGE) swastica on his back. The manga was kinda Kenshin-esque. I really liked it, but the swedish "Manga Mania" magazine decided to replace it with another because there was too much violence. It's almost impossible to find it in Sweden... Boo-hoo. :cry:

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Mon Jul 25, 2005 6:47 pm There's also a Kanji read "manji" that is a swastika. In Ebichu they describe the "manji" position.
